title: Payments Incident Escalation Matrix
content:
Payments Incident Escalation Matrix

Use this matrix when Payment Outage Runbook escalation step is reached.

Sev-1 Escalation Path (time from incident start):
- T+0 min: L1 Payments On-Call (PagerDuty: payments-oncall-primary)
- T+10 min: L2 Payments Engineering Lead (if no mitigation)
- T+20 min: L3 Platform SRE + DBA on-call
- T+30 min: Incident Commander + VP Payments
- T+45 min: CTO office notification for customer-visible outage > 30 min

Sev-2 Escalation Path:
- T+0: L1 On-Call via Slack #payments-incidents
- T+30 min: L2 Engineering Lead if unresolved
- T+2 hr: L3 Platform if infrastructure suspected

Contact Roles:
- L1 On-Call: First responder, runs runbook triage and recovery steps.
- L2 Engineering Lead: Code rollback, feature flags, application-level fixes.
- L3 Platform/DBA: Database pool tuning, infra scaling, network/firewall issues.
- Incident Commander: Cross-team coordination, comms approval, severity calls.

External Escalation:
- Payment gateway vendor (primary): Tier-2 support after 15 min Sev-1.
- Card network liaison: For scheme-wide authorization failures.

De-escalation: Downgrade severity only after 30 minutes of stable metrics per SLA Policy targets.
